content: agent1: implementing case_sensitive param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py. Will touch do_groupby/do_sort and possibly ignore_case helper. Let me know if you're touching filters.py too.

agent1: done - added case_sensitive param to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby in filters.py (signature: attribute, default=None, case_sensitive=False). Sorting/grouping key uses ignore_case postprocess when not case_sensitive, then remaps grouper to original-case value from first item in group. Since we both touch do_groupby signature, just a heads up in case your with_counts param needs to slot in after case_sensitive - each of us submits our own patch.txt independently so should be fine, but wanted you aware of the exact signature I landed on.
